description: ProofX is a service for protecting and verifying digital content with cryptographic signatures. The `proofx-mcp.fly.dev` host exposes its MCP server and OAuth authorization server metadata.
summary: ProofX exposes one MCP server at `https://proofx-mcp.fly.dev/mcp`, authenticated with OAuth 2.0 authorization code + PKCE via its advertised authorization server metadata.
